body:
## Problem
Users struggle with writing Professional Summaries and Job Descriptions.

## Impact
- Writer's block/fatigue
- Lack of recognition over recall (Heuristic #6)

## Tasks
- [ ] Add a "View Examples" tooltip/modal for the Summary field
- [ ] Implement a "Resume Helper" sidebar with role-specific phrases
- [ ] (Optional) Integrate AI text generation for job descriptions
- [ ] Add placeholder text that suggests actual content (e.g., "Experienced in [Skill]...")
title: [UX-03] Introduce Field-Level Templates and AI Examples
